modal_volume.name: autoalphafold3-data
modal_volume.storage_policy: Public data Volume for raw mmCIFs, public features, provenance, runs, and renders. Locked scorer assets must not be uploaded here.

locked_volume.name: autoalphafold3-locked
locked_volume.storage_policy: Scorer-only locked Volume for manifests, validation labels, and scorer metadata.

template_search.policy: No-template benchmark. Template tensors are empty schema placeholders only; no template database is required.
